overview.description: The Innovator Equity Managed 10 Buffer ETF (XBFR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund provides US large-cap equity exposure with a rolling 10% downside buffer over one-year periods. The fund uses a laddered options strategy to help cushion losses while giving up a portion of upside returns. XBFR was launched on Feb 23, 2026 and is issued by Innovator.
